name: Family Simulator Beach Games
description: Get ready to enjoy exciting winter holidays with your virtual family in this fun filled family vacation simulator. Travel with mom, dad, and family members to beautiful vacation destinations and experience memorable picnic adventures. Complete thrilling activities, explore amazing locations, and enjoy realistic family life in this vacation simulator game. Top Features in Family Simulator Beach Games: Plan an exciting winter vacation trip with your virtual family. Enjoy fun family activities during beach picnics and hill station adventures. Drive powerful 4x4 vehicles on snowy mountain roads and challenging tracks.
instructions: Desktop WASD Movement Left Shift Sprint Ctrl Settings P amp Tab Pause F Action I Instruction Mobile Joystick
